item.title: Download RapidRAW 1.5.2
item.description: RapidRAW is a modern, high-performance, open-source RAW photo editor, designed to deliver a fast and clean editing experience with a lightweight footprint (under 30MB). Built with performance and usability in mind, the software is aimed at photographers who want a simple, efficient, and fun workflow without compromising performance. Key Features GPU-accelerated processing: Uses a custom WGSL shader to process all image adjustments on the GPU, allowing for smooth, responsive editing...

item.title: Download FFmpeg Batch AV Converter 3.2.8 + Portable
item.description: FFmpeg Batch AV Converter is an ffmepg gui, a user interface for Windows ffmpeg users and for Linux via Wine, allowing to use the full potential of the ffmpeg command line only with a few mouse clicks in a convenient GUI. Among other things, you can drag and drop, view progress information, change encoding priority, pause and resume, and set auto shutdown. It's good for seasoned ffmpeg users as well as beginners. item.title: Download YUMI exFAT 1.0.3.6
item.description: YUMI exFAT is a Multiboot USB creator that supports exFAT format and files larger than 4GB. BIOS and USB UEFI boot. YUMI exFAT is compatible with Ventoy.
